rationale: Opening “Incidents by Assignment” may show incidents grouped by who they’re assigned to (or close enough to quickly verify), which is likely the needed report to identify agents and their counts.

action_text: Type “Assigned To” into the reports list search field
rationale: Filtering the Global reports list to titles containing “Assigned To” directly targets the report that shows incidents per assignee/agent.

action_text: Type “Assigned to” into the reports list search field
rationale: If the capitalization differs, searching for “Assigned to” (lowercase “to”) can surface the correct report title variant.

action_text: Type “Assigned” into the reports list search field
rationale: Using a broader keyword “Assigned” widens the filter to show any relevant reports, including those for “Assigned to.”

action_text: Scroll down the Global reports list to see more report titles
rationale: There may be a “Number of Incidents by Assigned To” further down the alphabetically sorted list; scrolling can reveal it.
